description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image (with the build-project job overriding to node:8) and a cache of the node_modules directory. Define a build stage with a build-project job that runs the following commands in order: useradd -m -p 123 builder; apt-get update; apt-get -yq install chromium; apt-get -yq install git; npm install -g bower grunt-cli; npm install; bower install --allow-root; chmod 777 -fR .; su builder -c "grunt test"; find . -name lcov.info | xargs -d '\n' cat | node_modules/.bin/codacy-coverage -t $CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN; su builder -c "grunt release". The job stores coverage/, doc/ and dist/ as artifacts for 1 day, extracts a coverage metric with the regex /Lines\s*:\s*(\d+\.\d+)%/, and uses the node_modules cache. Add a deploy stage with a pages job that runs only on the master branch, depends on build-project, executes ls -l, creates a .public directory, moves coverage/ and doc/ into .public, renames .public to public, and publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact for 90 days.
